content: FASE 1: Crear services/match_stage_detector.py con detect_match_stage() + keyword maps multilingual
FASE 2: Inyectar competition_stage/match_importance/is_final en el compact payload del LLM (normalizer)
FASE 3: Actualizar MOTIVATION_RULES_V2 + prefilter + system prompt con COMPETITION_STAGE_OVERRIDE
FASE 4: Añadir validation guard post-LLM (force HIGH_BOTH en finales, limpiar reasons, mover de discarded_motivation)
FASE 5: Activar injury_sources hook opcional en analyst_engine.py (Tier 1, feature flag, soft-fail)
FASE 7: Frontend - mostrar pressure_state badge en MotivationContextBlock (opcional pero útil)
FASE 8: Lint + curl test + testing agent E2E
